title: manulea leiostachys
intro: Manulea leiostachys, also known as Manulea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Manulea leiostachys include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Manulea leiostachys can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
